infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: ShareSpare needs microphone access to record voice messages.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ShareSpare requires camera access to capture rich media for chat and requests.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ShareSpare requires photo library access to upload avatars and share media.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ShareSpare uses your location to match requests and share live locations in chats.

plugins.microphonePermission: ShareSpare needs microphone access to record voice messages.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: ShareSpare requires location to accurately map local requests and enable live location sharing.

plugins.photosPermission: ShareSpare requires photos access to attach images to requests.
plugins.cameraPermission: ShareSpare requires camera access to snap request photos.
